subject: [PATCH v7 01/20] nfsd: check fl_lmops in nfsd_breaker_owns_lease()

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a check to the nfsd_breaker_owns_lease() function to verify that the lease being checked is an NFS daemon-managed lease by checking if its fl_lmops field matches the nfsd_lease_mng_ops structure. This ensures that only leases created by the NFS daemon are considered for ownership checks, preventing potential issues with other types of leases.
